sous_titres.text: All characters and events in this film are purely fictional.
I knew that junkie was trouble.
Det. Cha, grab him! He put his mouth on it!
Asshole! Why can't you just stay still!
-Shit, why won't you let me drink?! -Okay, fine, you'll slip!
Oh Jae-chul, the son of Dongin Milling's chairman.
This prick asked for you as soon as he got here.
I'm better than some random lawyer.
Three for the same crime, one year of probation left.
We got him spooked with possession for sale,
so, put a bow on it.
Putting a bow on him is hardly enough!
We got a VIP on the hook.
You don't look like a dealer.
How'd you end up carrying 500g around?
That depends on whether you, me,
So, $100K, $160K in total with the three heads.
I'll leave the amount to you.
Enough drugs for 66,000 users, a major drug ring busted!
and you get to go home.
You sure lack some manners, right?
You could've given me a call after your release,
but I guess that's not so easy.
Even while doing business as usual.
If I lose 2/3 of it, how can I afford to eat?
Because the cops lock you up
Wanna go detox for a bit?
Chang-rak, stop cutting it with shit!
How can you reach the top like this?
Not just possession, but dealers and mules.
If I don't get a call you'll be the first to go.
Why the hell isn't that asshole here yet?!
Why the fuck did she back up?!
Could you step out and check the damage?
Can you roll down the window?
Dude, let's get the fuck out of here!
-Break the window! -Open the door, you pricks!
Sang-chul, they're headed your way, block them!
Christ, what a bunch a amateurs.
Still got one more hit left.
Junkies won't listen, you gotta bulldoze them.
Korea's drug scene is divided into three groups:
those who deal, those who catch them,
I provide cases involving arrested junkies to the police.
These cases boost the cops' performance,
which comes back to the junkies as Investigation Cooperation Agreement.
Get out of jail free card.
It can slash a 10-year sentence down to just one-third.
A plea bargain that only exists
It came out nice and clean.
In short, all major drug busts are
neatly greased wheels in this system.
I paid for it and I'll use them all, what's the problem, fuckers?!
The media has to create a buzz for the case to look good,
only then does the Cooperation Agreement follow.
I exist in symbiosis between junkies and the police across the country.
In the drug scene, people like me are called:
One tiny choice makes the difference between
a rising star and a washed-up failure.
I'm gonna go see my side chick for a bit.
You're under arrest for violating the Narcotics Control Act.
Don't step on the door threshold.
Farting is only allowed in the bathroom.
How dare you fart in here!
Every year, 23,000 drug offenders get locked up with blue inmate numbers.
Is it a Smurf day today?
Didn't I tell you not to sit here?
It wasn't until I became one of them that I realized:
my life had gone terribly off track.
But even in a crappy life, opportunities arise.
Prosecutor Ku was just another prosecutor before meeting me.
he was exiled to Northern District where he handled drug offenders.
Of them, only 1% become high-ranking chief prosecutors.
The remaining 99% must resign within 10 years.
But Ku had no intention of resigning from his post.
He began creating his own opportunities to make it into the top 1%.
Drug investigations are no different from catching cockroaches.
Swatting a few that you see won't make them disappear.
You've got to raid their nest.
Ko Heung-sik is in cell 2, Right?
Complete List of Drug Offenders in Cell 2 He's in cell 2.
Yeah, you don't have the look of a junkie.
You drank a drink he gave you and blanked out?
He used you because he thought he was gonna get caught.
Are you good at memorizing things?
Ko Heung-sik is in your cell, right?
I don't know about this stuff.
You'll have to know everything here.
And I need to know what you find out, got it?
If you just fill in these blanks,
I'll cut your sentence by half.
Punk ass bitch, didn't I tell you not to come here?
To do that, what do you need to do?
You'll have to get Ko's attention, right?
Can I ask you for a favor?
Son of a bitch! Are you out of your mind?!
Two packages of goods just came in.
Should we send them to Pyeongtaek and Incheon?
Send the Pyeongtaek package to Myung-cheon,
should be sent to Jung-yeop and get a sample first.
If you leave it like this, it'll scar.
I'm Prosecutor Ku Gwan-hee from Uijeongbu Prosecutors' Office.
Based on testimony from Ko Heung-sik's subordinate,
a major drug ring leader held at Uijeongbu Detention Center...
What the hell is he saying?
Where the hell is Lee Kang-su?!
I came here to learn some skills.
A beef gift set under my name?
It's no big deal, let me know if you want more.
Come on, you didn't have to do that.
Your mom works alone in the orchard, she needs to eat well.
Didn't you tell her you're in prison?
If my mom finds out, she'll collapse.
I don't know, ever seen a good son in prison?
My mom raised me alone too.
She'd head to the market to sell fish before dawn,
and then wash dishes all day at a restaurant.
She'd always say, "Don't live in a way that gets you looked down on."
"Whatever you do, succeed, just succeed, always succeed."
It's fine, I'll take care of it.
No need to be coy, it's okay to drink.
I'm getting transferred to the Western District this time.
But after the Eastern District, I'll aim for the Central Prosecutors' Office.
What will you do when you get out?
If I were a real junkie, I'd celebrate with a big hit.
Why don't you become a professional snitch?
You'll never have to worry about making a living.
And you can help your bro out too.
It's just a bit awkward, you suddenly said "bro."
From now on, let's be brothers.
If I can help you, I'll do it.
Not as a junkie and a prosecutor,
Brother! Let me pour you a drink!
This is advice from your new brother.
The moment you stick a needle in your arm, your life is over.
3 years later, present day how far up are we going?
They've been like this for hours,
they won't respond no matter what I say!
You have the right to retain a lawyer and remain silent!
No response, I'll handle it my way!
Boss, the tow truck is here.
Please take care of it right away!
I didn't know it was bad.
Here we go again, the same old excuse.
Who gave you the diet pills?
If you stay silent, I won't be able to help you.
He was charged for drug use two years ago and got probation.
The son of Ilmoon Construction chairman, right?
You don't know my name, huh?
But the junkies call me "Jade Emperor."
If I catch you, I'll bury you in charges and lock you up for life.
One call, and the reporters will swarm in like vultures.
How about we walk the photo line together?
Wondering who you can talk about and who you can't.
If we catch someone, they'll rat you out.
If it gets to that point,
if you just tell the truth, I'll let you go home.
Instead, I catch the dealer and fuck him up.
Catch 100 users, and there'll be 100 more the next day.
Where did it all start from?
The dealer who supplied the drugs.
Not just anyone can enter here.
This is where we investigate VIPs like conglomerate chairmen,
We grill them in the interrogation room and then baby them here unofficially.
This place is not for regular folks, you're in the VIP room.
I'm a VIP, right? Unofficial VIP.
And look down at the entire view.
I feel like I'm dangling off the edge of this railing, about to drop.
If you fall from here, you're screwed.
That's why I hold on for my dear life!
So, you have to do well, you punk.
You know what I mean? We all need to do well.
Why worry about stuff like that?
I'll give you my full support.
Let's aim for the Special Investigation Unit.
If you're going all the way to the Central District SIU,
you need to smoke even your cigarettes in style!
It's only available to the real big shots.
Low-level junkies can't even dream of this stuff.
The price is insane, oh man...
Come on, tell me, what's the deal?!
A guy was caught with 500g of this stuff last week.
I brokered a deal with the police on his behalf,
I smell a hint of something baking.
it's gasoline leaking everywhere at the gas stop!
So who's the guy spilling all this gasoline?
Mr. Yeom, but I don't know his full name.
Now you're being picky about your food.
Then you can do it yourself.
Call that even for the missing 500g
Did you see Kim Hak-nam flinch, trying to keep a straight face?
Should we dip her one of these days?
You think her boys will stay quietly?
We gotta ship her off to prison like her brothers,
so that we can deal Yamamoto's goods.
Boss, we'll block him up front.
We hit him when they reach Namdong.
Mr. Yeom Tae-su! Seems like you've lost your edge!
You got pigs lined up behind you.
There's no time to look back!
Get out of here, I'll cover you!
We can intro in person later,
-Request support! -You guys take the other side!
Don't be cheeky, and put that down!
That gives you the right to snatch away suspects?
There seems to be some misunderstanding.
We've been staking this guy out for days!
Thank you for your hard work.
Is this some kind of joke? What's going on?
Hey, isn't that the guy we saw in the car?
he's on the rise as a snitch lately.
These guys are trying to cherry pick my case.
I told you we'd intro in person.
Are you the one who snitched on me?
You should head inside and get some rest.
How many years will you ask for? Five?
Smuggling, illegal trade, usage, and possession.
Those are at least seven years.
If I feel like it, I could push for up to 15 years.
So, how about we wrap this up officially here?
Or should we have a private conversation?
Investigation Cooperation Agreement Let's smoke a cigarette and sign, okay?
Why don't you take the lead?
When you meet anyone here, just give me a call.
You won't get into any trouble.
You can trust me on that.
Just tell me the location, and slip out.
Where are you going? Let's head inside.
I'm suddenly not feeling well, I think I'll go home and rest.
That guy helped our father a lot.
And he really wants to meet you.
Baby, today's really not good, next time, please?
You can't get sick when you feel like it.
You could be the headliner now.
You suddenly want to come along, right?
If I see you again, you're as good as dead.
You'll need to take a number for that.
But I'm not sure if your turn will come in time.
Safety first, be careful out there.
Alright, good work, let's meet often.
If you're ready, let's head in!
These people are just partying here!
We can just have fun on our own.
I was about to call you.
How do I know which agency they're from?
But can they really barge in like this?
So, you're the boss around here, huh?
How about we get you on TV?
Dammit, what the hell's going on?
It's those Eastern District guys again.
We've got to make a living too!
We can lock you all up for obstruction of justice!
Sir, you'll get in trouble, please calm down!
These boars have such sharp instincts.
Give me a call so we can grab a drink.
-Sure thing. -Make sure to call me this time.
Is this how you really conduct an investigation?
But don't overdo it, none of this really matters.
Causing a ruckus won't do you any favors.
I just made one call to keep things quiet.
I really didn't know it would reach Chief Prosecutor Kim.
Because of your call, my phone's been ringing off the hook.
You must think I'm an easy target.
I wouldn't have come in person if I thought that.
You want to move up, right?
If you handle this matter properly,
our candidate won't just sit idly by, I guarantee it.
Build this connection, help him out a bit, and...
things will turn out even better for you.
Nothing happened at Laura Hill Hotel.
Your words could get you in big trouble.
The number you are dialing is unavailable...
Bro, why aren't you picking up? I'm on my way to the bar.
Just wrap things up and come over, okay?
I know you got nothing to do.
Don't your underlings do all the work?
That was easier than hitting a deer.
We're from the Eastern Prosecutors' Office.
-Captain, why are these people here? -We have a search warrant.
What's up? Why are you here?
In the course of our drug investigation,
Yeom Tae-su testified that you took bribes.
I came to give you a drink.
The veins pop out better when you tense up.
Rising star actress Uhm Su-jin has been arrested on drug charges.
Uhm is accused of using methamphetamine at a hotel in Seoul,
I told you I'd kill you if I ever see you again.
Kang-su, you son of a bitch.
No food, keep him on meth for a month, then toss him.
Welcome, let me show you inside!
3 months later Welcome, let me show you inside!
Enough, your attitude is all wrong!
You think an addict even realizes he's addicted?
Quitting meth is harder than getting it in the first place, retard.
You thought quitting meth was easy?!
Food probably feels like sand, right?
But you need to eat to start feeling better!
When you're off drugs, you see roaches, spiders and shit.
If you check the location data from my phone,
you'll see that I never met Yeom Tae-su, who allegedly bribed me.
Finally, a question for the prosecutor who's kept me here for a year.
Can I investigate and arrest you based solely on a claim,
by a criminal with eight drug convictions?
I will now announce the verdict.
The defendant, Oh Sang-jae, is acquitted.
See you at the Supreme Court.
I'm Park Hyun-sook of the Creative People's Party.
You've read the letter I sent, haven't you?
I understand that you were at the Laura Hill Hotel incident last year,
I heard there's a video recorded from that day.
-Cho Sang-taek's son was also there, right? -What exactly do you want to know?
Believing baseless claims made by a drug dealer is what led to this,
-shouldn't you be uncovering the truth? -Stop it.
Yeah, I know Park Hyun-sook, the spokesperson.
No need to respond, just stay out of sight...
No! I'll take care of it,
just leave for a month and lay low!
Let's meet at Eclipse before you leave.
This fucker just won't listen, and just yaps away.
I heard you asked for me, my apologies for being late.
You're allowed to be, you're a famous prosecutor.
The election is less than a month away,
and she's poking around my friends' work and homes.
Yapping about the Laura Hill from a year ago...
Arrest Warrant Denied for Cho Hoon Can't you do something?
Park was a journalist, so she can be tenacious.
She fixates on a few facts and spins them into a narrative.
Just tell me what you're gonna do about it, old man!
You shouldn't shout as soon as I arrive.
Chairman Kang Myung-chul, locked up for accounting fraud,
Candidate #2 Yoon Sung-hyup is a high school alumnus of Candidate Yoon.
The total election fund delivered to Yoon's side is $10 million.
Initially, it was $3 million in cash, including dollars.
A week later, $5 million in yen,
and finally, $3 million in cash and gift cards.
I'm trying to help you return to managing your company,
He'll say the mule was Park, would that do?
Shit, that's why I love you.
Okay, I'll talk to dad about it.
Take good care of your friends, keep them on leash.
Everyone's leaving by Saturday, so just keep that in mind.
don't bring in dealers like Yeom anymore.
Join me and let's do this!
Don't they all look like members of a cult?
Check the black tape under the AC
Do you help with the injection?
Not in-person, send deposit, and you get a drop
Should I look elsewhere? Others even hang out with you...
Many of them report you to the cops
This is my arm, I'll pay extra
My veins are good, so just poke anywhere.
First time in this room, Mr. Song?
but this one is tied to a potentially hot case.
Look at me, forgetting to offer you a drink.
You should cool those hot cases outside.
Is this about Haeshin's Chairman Kang Myung-chul?
I heard he's practically commuting here from prison.
The thing about Chairman Kang is,
And it was funneled to Candidate Yoon's campaign.
We have the ledger detailing the transactions and even a confession.
But pulling the players out of the game
this close to the election is very strange, am I right?
Give me the source, and I'll start the buzz.
This case will spiral out of control.
This isn't tambourine work, my friend.
How many years have you been reporting from here?
You keep calling me Prosecutor, four years in, you're practically family.
The 21st presidential election is now less than two weeks away.
The gap between candidates Cho and Yoon has narrowed.
Compared to the poll conducted ten days ago...
Why aren't you coming in? Want a cigarette?
Either he's gone into hiding or fled overseas,
he went dark for over a year.
I need to find that bastard and put him on trial.
I sold my house to pay the lawyer $100,000 retainer.
If I lose at the third trial,
I'll have to raise Hye-in in a rental.
Give me Jong-su and one capable guy.
You'll likely win the trial anyway.
If you keep poking around, the prosecutors will lose it.
Why do we always have to tiptoe around the prosecutors?
How could we not after what they did to you?
Back us up on paperwork until the trial's over.
and if you come out to the field, it'll look bad.
Sons of bitches. You guys full?
You've got balls showing up here!
Good to see you, we got a lot to catch up on!
Do you want to cuff yourself or should I do it?
we can't have a civil chat.
Who are you trying to swindle?!
You set me up, didn't you? Did Yeom order you?!
We both got set up together...
I didn't order Yeom to set you up, fucker!
When I was released, only junkies reached out to me.
Yeom lit my legs on fire and injected drugs in me.
Both of my legs were melting,
but I was so high after a hit, I didn't feel the pain.
He kept me drugged up for a month.
Detective, you want that bastard, right?
You asked me who it was.
The guy looking at his phone.
I bet even Prosecutor Ku freaked out over this.
he happens to be the son of a leading presidential candidate.
A snitch who fetched a sensitive case,
an actress who was at the scene,
and a narco who investigated the case.
He cleared out the three troublemakers in one go.
take down a chief prosecutor and the presidential candidate's son?
The video I shot at Laura Hill Hotel
He's exporting top-quality North Korean meth to Japan.
Kim Hak-nam in Incheon had the exclusive right to it,
Takeshi Yamamoto: Japanese Drug Dealer but Yeom snatched it away.
A reward for getting rid of us.
There's a way to lure him out of hiding.
If we intercept his drugs during transport...
There's a party Cho Hoon is hosting this Friday.
The guest list includes the usual suspects, including me.
It's a one-time opportunity, by Saturday, they'll all fly out.
I'll film Cho getting high there.
That'll be the irrefutable evidence to send him away.
It's three on three, we can each cover our target.
I'll stick around until Yeom's arrest, you two handle the cleanup, got it?
Quitting drugs is tough, you think it was easy for me?
Why are you asking me?! I don't fucking know!
What the fuck am I doing with drug addicts?
In meth, that's $700,000 per, totaling $2.1 million.
Why'd a snitching punk do me a favor?
Captain, we're in the distribution business!
If we reveal the whole chain, what will they live on?
Eat up and be on your way.
Yeom really got you spooked, huh?
Drug trafficking, smuggling, head of a drug ring...
Should I cuff you, or Yeom Tae-su?
The guy who forced you into exile.
Tell me about how the North Korean blue meth
When my girls bring in goods from China to Incheon,
they're transported to the factory and packaged nicely.
Then, Yamamoto's live fish truck comes from Japan to our factory.
The truck is driven by one Yamamoto,
they load the truck with eels and meth,
and drive straight to Busan to meet with Yeom.
It's a direct route, but they make just one stop.
At Youngshin Fish Restaurant near Sujeong-dong, Incheon.
The Japanese driver can't resist their fish cake stew.
They're coming on an early Friday morning ferry.
The room where Haeshin Construction's Chairman Kang Myung-chul
handed over $5 million in cash to Rep. Park Hyun-sook is this one.
This is where Chairman Kang handed over the money,
prosecutors revealed the cash funded Yoon Sung-hyup's campaign.
All signals have been blocked on this camera.
With this cover, it'll be undetectable.
If it feels too dangerous, bail out, and call me if anything happens.
I think you said something similar a year ago...
Don't apologize, I'm not ready yet.
And let me make one thing clear,
I'm doing this because I want to.
Once you get the footage, text me.
Just focus on your own tasks, okay?
You think this plan will work?
Depends on how well you follow Su-jin's lead.
A washed-up snitch is preaching to me now?
Junkies have no manners or respect for hierarchy.
Geez, I told you, I quit!
Stop calling me a junkie, alright?
If you can just quit, is it really a drug?
Just put on your seat belt!
Dammit, where the hell is the seat belt?
Wouldn't it be easier to just grab those bastards and mess them up?
First, we need to get the goods, okay?
After that, catching Yeom will be a piece of cake.
Once he realizes his stash is gone, he'll go berserk and come running.
You know how there are lots of rehab centers abroad?
But we don't have that here.
Find a scenic spot overseas, lock them up tight...
Charge $10,000 per head and boom, a goldmine!
Where'd a junkie get the money to pay for that?
Hey, I'd take you in for free!
You need someone by your side to quit, you know that?
Bring you proper food, cheer you on...
You gotta tell me what's going on!
Where the hell did he go?
You gotta tell me where you're going.
-I'll need to check your bag. -Just let her in!
Boss, the goods are great, we even saved the leftovers.
Japanese guys will be at Gamcheon Port, Dock 3.
Say "Delicious" in Korean, don't speak Japanese, asshole.
Damn, good to see you, asshole.
We got some catching up to do.
Why do you make things so complicated?
Why are the eels on the ground?
Die, you son of a bitch!
Are you allowed to do this?
Where's the footage? Spit it out!
How about we get you on TV.
Su-jin's footage will be the feature.
Is this the prosecution? I'd like to report a drug deal.
Let me ask you one thing.
The one who made me a junkie.
Your words could get you in big trouble.
You're a dealer, you must have some leftovers!
Because a snitch was colluding with a prosecutor.
Can you comment on the confession by Haeshin's Chairman Kang?
Is it true that $10 million was embezzled for candidate Yoon?
I've never received money from Chairman Kang,
so how could I have delivered it to Candidate Yoon?
The location is a yacht named Eclipse at Seoul Marina.
That's part of our operation, so don't send the Coast Guard.
I arrested him red-handed for drug dealing, 5kg in total!
I'll personally take the statement later, understood?
I thought your role ended after Yeom's arrest.
I need to make sure Su-jin gets out safely.
Be quiet! I said be quiet!
Someone may be trapping you, get out of there now.
Didn't you say you blocked the Coast Guard?
They know the yacht's name and exact location, so hurry up!
Sir, Det. Oh brought in Yeom Tae-su.
Yes, it seems like he was working with Lee Kang-su.
You sure it was Lee Kang-su?
I looked into it just to make sure,
and it seems Uhm Su-jin is also on Lee's side.
That actress who was caught at Laura Hill.
The three of them are together.
Lee Kang-su, Uhm Su-jin and Oh Sang-jae.
So, Uhm is on the yacht.
Don't make calls like a fool when you fly out, use Telegram.
Don't contact anyone until the election is over.
Don't give me a half-ass answer.
Don't go around acting like a meth head,
Kang-su, we're on the way back!
You said you'd mess Cho Hoon up.
The job's done, no need for face-to-face.
Got nothing to say to me?
Let's hear a formal apology in front of everyone.
Crying and begging wouldn't be a bad touch, either.
Just say it, what's the big deal?
I did a terrible thing to you.
Wait, you can't go in there!
Nothing good comes from working with a cop too long.
You got Yeom Tae-su like you wanted.
and fly out of this hell hole.
Not before I apologize to Su-jin.
Let's end Cho Hoon just like Su-jin wanted.
And tie Ku into it, too.
How can we do that without anything solid?
Lee Kang-su and Oh Sang-jae are listed on the call log.
You bragged that everything was under control!
Is it so hard to clean shit up without any traces?
There's news and gossip stirring things up every single day,
you had to cause another trouble?
can make or break a president.
What the hell's wrong with him?
You're the boss around here, huh?
You too, has it been a year?
Seeing that video brought back memories, you had it?
Let me have it if it's in your possession.
Why'd I give it to you?
I might've given it to you.
I think you're seriously misunderstanding something.
If this is about what happened a year ago, let's clear it up.
It wasn't me, would I have ordered something like that?
It's as if you know what was ordered.
You told me not to do drugs.
You said you were my bro!
You stick a needle in your brother?
You think I studied my ass off,
just to spend my life chasing junkies like you?
I don't know what kind of crap you're pulling right now, but stop it.
Or else, you'll kill me too?
then look forward to what I'm gonna do next,
and what I'll unleash very soon.
The next time we meet, it'll be in hell.
First time in Seoul in so long.
You shoulda killed Yeom, why hand him over to Jade Emperor?
Yeom's drug shipment meant for Yamamoto.
Yamamoto's going to kill him for sure.
That guy has a terrible temper.
$100,000 per kilo, $2.5 million in total, it's a bargain.
So what do you want me to do?
Get me a boat to China, two passengers.
The other is for Jade Emperor?
What are you two up to?
We're gonna pull a job on Prosecutor Ku and take off.
Get the money and boat ready.
It's going to take some time.
Hold on, can't you hear my gears spinning?
This is where Ko Chang-rak lived with Kang-su.
We just need to find Lee Kang-su's video.
I should've locked him up that night.
I'm right on Lee Kang-su's tail,
I want to help you and leave a good impression, sir.
Sounds like you want something from me.
You know that he took my spot, right?
He's headed to Rep. Park Hyun-sook
to hand over a video and a recording containing your voice.
Give it up, there's no time.
I'll go ahead and get everything ready.
This is our only chance, don't mess it up.
Everything will work out, don't be a chicken shit.
I'm Det. Oh Sang-jae from the Narcotics Unit!
I have something to deliver to Rep. Park.
We'll pass it along for you.
No, I must give it to her myself.
Please, you can't go any further.
Mr. Oh Sang-jae, you are under arrest for violating the Narcotics Control Act.
You sure made a lot of copies, Det. Oh.
Yes, sir, I made so many.
I'm gonna spread it all over the country.
He's already skipped town, it's over between us.
Tonight's third presidential debate hosted by the Central Election Commission,
is expected to focus on Candidate Cho Sang-taek's son's drug allegations.
"Hot cases should be cooled off outside."
Even so, this is way too hot.
A prosecutor investigates when there's a crime, no?
Same goes for reporters, you're on the side of truth.
Sir, you need to step inside.
Something urgent has come up, please go inside for now.
The face of Cho Hoon has now been identified clearly.
If his drug use is confirmed, it's only a matter of time...
Is he out of his mind?
Think of it as a grand gesture.
What the fuck are you doing?
Otherwise, I'll come with an arrest warrant.
Cho Hoon is coming in himself, let the press know.
